experiment: F-SWARMER2 genesis extraction — orient.py graceful degradation test
expect: orient.py gracefully degrades in daughter bundle (L-1467 claim: all optional imports wrapped in try/except)
actual: PARTIALLY FALSIFIED. 5 bare imports crashed daughter: check_foreign_staged_deletions, check_active_claims (orient_checks), external_grounding_check, closeable_frontiers, check_stale_infrastructure. Fixed with try/except wrappers. 3 additional required modules missing from genesis CORE_TOOLS: orient_state.py, orient_sections.py, orient_analysis.py, orient_monitors.py. After fix: daughter orient runs successfully at 772KB (117 files).
diff: L-1467 claimed all optional imports wrapped — 5 were not. orient.py has 4 companion modules (orient_checks, orient_state, orient_sections, orient_analysis, orient_monitors) totaling 85KB that are hard dependencies, not optional. Genesis extraction must include them.
